title: Adelante Soluciones Financieras (Addi.com)
description: Over 16M unique persons records containing significant PII, financial/transactions (credit cards), KYC and data from TransUnion and Experian (background checks) . The company failed to reach an agreement with us despite our incredible patience, all the chances and offers we made. They don't care. | Size: 518GB+ (compressed) | Updated: 5 May 2026 | SHA256: 520d50dc384fc474e419fdd19cb3517ed6ce778a187ae7d6f44b93ccef5687db
